/tmp/cache.description: Temporary cache directory — non-critical, easily restored from application restart

audit_logs.description: Audit trail database — legally protected record, permanent deletion prohibited by compliance policy

payment-service.description: Payment processing service — high criticality, business-hours constraint active, requires L5 human approval

nginx/timeout.description: Web server timeout configuration — low risk, fully reversible via config rollback

user_data.description: User account data — GDPR-protected, irreversible deletion requires DPO authorization

financial_records.description: Financial transaction records — legally required retention, deletion prohibited

app-config.description: Application configuration — reversible via git rollback, medium criticality

prod-database.description: Production database — irreversible operations blocked, requires backup confirmation and L5 approval
